title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Reliance Footprint

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Reliance Footprint
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, Reliance Footprint in Allahabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Reliance Footprint:
Reliance Footprint is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Footprint!
